          {
            "text": "  const advance = useCallback(() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "    const timeSinceOpen = Date.now() - openedAtRef.current;",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Ignore advances within 300ms of opening (prevents accidental instant close)",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (timeSinceOpen &lt; 300) return;",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Don't advance with Space/Enter if current line has choices",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (hasChoices) return;",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (lineIndex &lt; lines.length - 1) {",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "      setLineIndex((i) =&gt; i + 1);",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "    } else {",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "      cancelSpeech();",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "      closeDialogue();",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "      unlockInteractions();",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "      setLineIndex(0);",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "  }, [lineIndex, lines.length, closeDialogue, hasChoices]);",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "  const handleChoice = useCallback((action: string) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "    cancelSpeech();",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "    closeDialogue();",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "    unlockInteractions();",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "    setLineIndex(0);",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "    EventBridge.emit('dialogue-choice', { action });",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "  }, [closeDialogue]);",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "  useEffect(() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!isOpen) return;",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "    openedAtRef.current = Date.now();",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.4318176507949829

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default function GameContainer() {",
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "const handleInfoKey = ",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "      e.preventDefault();",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "      const state = useGameStore.getState();",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "      const { flashlightBattery, spareBatteries } = state.player;",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "      const { booksRemainingOnThisMap, exploredTiles, explorableTileCount } = state.session;",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "      const fragmentCount = state.library.length;",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "      const discoveryPercent = explorableTileCount &gt; 0",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "        ? Math.round((exploredTiles.length / explorableTileCount) * 100)",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "        : 0;",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Build natural spoken summary with pauses (periods create TTS pauses)",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "      const parts: string[] = [];",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "      ",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Flashlight status",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (flashlightBattery &gt; 75) {",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push(&#96;Flashlight at ${flashlightBattery} percent. Good condition.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (flashlightBattery &gt; 50) {",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push(&#96;Flashlight at ${flashlightBattery} percent.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (flashlightBattery &gt; 25) {",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push(&#96;Flashlight at ${flashlightBattery} percent. Getting low.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else {",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push(&#96;Flashlight at ${flashlightBattery} percent. Critically low.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Spare batteries (no \"press B\" hint here - that's said on pickup)",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (spareBatteries === 0) {",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push('No spare batteries.');",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (spareBatteries === 1) {",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push('1 spare battery.');",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else {",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push(&#96;${spareBatteries} spare batteries.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Fragments remaining",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (booksRemainingOnThisMap === 0) {",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push('No book fragments left in this area.');",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (booksRemainingOnThisMap === 1) {",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push('1 book fragment remaining.');",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else {",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push(&#96;${booksRemainingOnThisMap} book fragments remaining.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Total collection progress",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "      const totalFragments = getTotalFragments();",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "      parts.push(&#96;Collection progress: ${fragmentCount} of ${totalFragments} total.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Discovery progress",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "      parts.push(&#96;Area explored: ${discoveryPercent} percent.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Join with \" ... \" for extra pauses between sections",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "      useGameStore.getState().actions.openDialogue",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 265,
            "isSignature": true
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/game/systems/Interaction.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 18
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 140,

          }
        },
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 19,
                "column": 1
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 19,

              }
            },
            {
              "startPosition": {

              },
              "endPosition": {

            }
          ]
        },
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export class InteractionSystem {",
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "  /** Attach to scene and player; call from ExploreScene.create() */",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "  attach(scene: Scene, player: IControllablePlayer): void {",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.scene = scene;",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.player = player;",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.boundKeyHandler = (e: KeyboardEvent) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (e.repeat) return; // Ignore key repeats",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (e.code === 'KeyE' || e.code === 'Space') {",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "        // Cooldown: ignore interactions within 300ms of last one",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "        const now = Date.now();",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "        if (now - this.lastInteractionTime &lt; 300) return;",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "        ",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "        const gamePhase = useGameStore.getState().session.gamePhase;",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "        if (INTERACTION_BLOCKED_PHASES.includes(gamePhase)) return;",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "        ",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "        // Auto-unlock if we're in exploring phase (safeguard against stuck lock)",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "        if (gamePhase === 'exploring') {",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "          interactionLocked = false;",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "        ",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "        // Check global lock (only blocks during state transitions)",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "        if (interactionLocked) return;",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "        ",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "        const target = this.currentInteractive;",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "        if (!target) return;",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "        ",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "        this.lastInteractionTime = now;",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "        e.preventDefault();",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "        ",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "        // Lock interactions before emitting",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "        interactionLocked = true;",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "        ",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "        // Emit immediately - the cooldown and lock prevent double-triggering",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "        EventBridge.emit('interaction-triggered', {",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "          type: target.type,",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "          id: target.id,",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "        });",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "    scene.input.keyboard!.on('keydown', this.boundKeyHandler);",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "    EventBridge.on('player-moving', this.onPlayerMoving);",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "    EventBridge.on('player-moved', this.onPlayerMoved);",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3976902961730957
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.cursor/rules/index.mdc",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 111
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 134
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- **NPCs and books**: NPCs are never placed in the same room as a book fragment. Use &#96;roomsWithBooks&#96; to exclude those rooms from &#96;npcRoomData&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "### BootScene Procedural Textures",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "- Placeholder sprites (player, book-pickup, transporter-pad, npc) are created with &#96;add.graphics()&#96;, drawn, &#96;generateTexture(key, w, h)&#96;, then &#96;destroy()&#96;. Replace with asset loading when tilesets are ready.",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Book/scroll assets**: itch.io has free packs (e.g. \"Book &amp; Scroll Set\" by TrulyMalicious). Use for book-pickup when moving from procedural to asset-based.",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "### Session vs Persisted State",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Persisted** (localStorage): player, library, exploration. **Session-only**: currentDialogue, gamePhase, exploredTiles, etc. exploredTiles resets on new map; addExploredTiles/clearExploredTiles in store actions.",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "### EventBridge Events",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;player-moving&#96;, &#96;player-moved&#96; { x, y }, &#96;interaction-available&#96; { type, label }, &#96;interaction-triggered&#96; { type, id }, &#96;interactive-consumed&#96; { type, id }, &#96;area-entered&#96; { areaName }",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "### Consumable Interactions (books, journals, batteries)",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "- **GameContainer** handles &#96;interaction-triggered&#96; and emits &#96;interactive-consumed&#96; only **after** successfully updating state (openDialogue, collectFragment, etc.).",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "- **ExploreScene** listens to &#96;interactive-consumed&#96; (not &#96;interaction-triggered&#96;) to destroy/remove map objects. Never destroy on &#96;interaction-triggered&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "- This ordering prevents race conditions where the object despawns before dialogue renders.",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "### Keyboard Handlers",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Always check &#96;e.repeat&#96;** — All keydown handlers should &#96;if (e.repeat) return;&#96; early to ignore key repeats. Without this, holding a key briefly causes multiple events that can instantly close single-line dialogues or trigger duplicate interactions.",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "### Phaser Tilemap Gotchas (reduce debug cycles)",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Avoid &#96;forEachTile&#96; / &#96;getTileAt&#96; on layers from separate tilemaps.** Layers created via &#96;make.tilemap({ data })&#96; from different tilemap instances can have incompatible internal structure; Phaser may throw &#96;undefined is not an object (evaluating 'layer.width')&#96; when iterating.",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Prefer fog overlays over per-tile alpha.** Instead of modifying each tile's alpha for fog of war, draw a Graphics overlay with &#96;fillRect&#96; per tile. Uses raw coordinates, no tilemap API.",
            "lineNumber": 134
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3722415864467621
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/store/gameStore.ts",

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "const createActions = ",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "(fragment: BookFragment) =&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "(s) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": ",",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "text": "            currentBookFragment: fragment,",
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "            isReadingBook: true,",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "text": "            gamePhase: 'reading',",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "text": "          },",
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "        };",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "      return {",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "        library: [...s.library, fragment],",
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "text": "        exploration: {",
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "          ...s.exploration,",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "          totalFragmentsFound: s.exploration.totalFragmentsFound + 1,",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "text": "        },",
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "text": "        session: {",
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "          ...s.session,",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "          currentDialogue: null,",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "text": "          currentBookFragment: fragment,",
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "text": "          isReadingBook: true,",
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "text": "          gamePhase: 'reading',",
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "text": "        },",
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "text": "      };",
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "text": "    }),",
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "text": "  markMapVisited: (mapId: string) =&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "text": "    set((s) =&gt; ({",
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "text": "      exploration: {",

          },
          {
            "text": "        ...s.exploration,",
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "text": "        visitedMaps: s.exploration.visitedMaps.includes(mapId)",
            "lineNumber": 171
          },
          {
            "text": "          ? s.exploration.visitedMaps",
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "text": "          : [...s.exploration.visitedMaps, mapId],",
            "lineNumber": 173
          },
          {
            "text": "      },",
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "text": "    })),",
            "lineNumber": 175
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "text": "  discoverNPC: (npcId: string) =&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 177
          },
          {
            "text": "    set((s) =&gt; ({",
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "text": "      exploration: {",
            "lineNumber": 179
          },
          {
            "text": "        ...s.exploration,",
            "lineNumber": 180
          },
          {
            "text": "        discoveredNPCs: s.exploration.discoveredNPCs.includes(npcId)",
            "lineNumber": 181
          },
          {
            "text": "          ? s.exploration.discoveredNPCs",
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "text": "          : [...s.exploration.discoveredNPCs, npcId],",
            "lineNumber": 183
          },
          {
            "text": "      },",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/game/systems/Interaction.ts",

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": " * Proximity-based interaction detection.",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": " * 'on' interactives (books, journals, transporter): prompt when standing ON the tile.",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": " * 'adjacent' interactives (NPCs): prompt when standing next to the tile (solid, block movement).",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": " * Emits interaction-available and interaction-triggered via EventBridge.",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "export class InteractionSystem {",
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  private scene: Scene | null = null;",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "  private player: IControllablePlayer | null = null;",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "  private interactives: Interactive[] = [];",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "  private currentInteractive: Interactive | null = null;",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "  private boundKeyHandler: ((e: KeyboardEvent) =&gt; void) | null = null;",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "  private isPlayerMoving = false;",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "  private lastInteractionTime = 0;",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "  private onPlayerMoving = () =&gt; { this.isPlayerMoving = true; };",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "  private onPlayerMoved = () =&gt; { this.isPlayerMoving = false; };",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "  /** Register an interactive object (called when entities spawn) */",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "  register(interactive: Interactive): void {",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!this.interactives.some((i) =&gt; i.id === interactive.id)) {",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.interactives.push(interactive);",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "  unregister(id: string): void {",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.interactives = this.interactives.filter((i) =&gt; i.id !== id);",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.36079269647598267
    },

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "'use client';",

          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 12
          },

            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "import { getTransporterDialogue as getTransporterDialogueFromContent } from '@/utils/contentLoader';",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "function getTotalFragments(): number {",

            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  try {",

          },

            "text": "    const catalog = getBookCatalogSync();",

          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "import DialogueBox from './DialogueBox';",

          },

          },
          {

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",

          },

            "text": " * Mounts Phaser canvas + UI overlays.",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },

            "lineNumber": 31
          },

            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "export default function GameContainer() {",
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  useEffect(() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "    const handleBatteryKey = (e: KeyboardEvent) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 35

          {

          {

          },
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/components/InteractionPrompt.tsx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 40,

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "'use client';",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "import { EventBridge } from '@/game/EventBridge';",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": " * Interaction prompt: \"[E] {label}\" — rendered as DOM to avoid Phaser Text/WebGL bugs.",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": " * Fixed position at bottom center; WCAG contrast.",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "export default function InteractionPrompt() {",
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  const [prompt, setPrompt] = useState&lt;{ type: string; label?: string } | null&gt;(null);",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "  useEffect(() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "    const onInteractionAvailable = ({ type, label }: { type: string; label?: string }) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (type) {",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "        setPrompt({ type, label });",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else {",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "        setPrompt(null);",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "    EventBridge.on('interaction-available', onInteractionAvailable);",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "    return () =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "      EventBridge.off('interaction-available', onInteractionAvailable);",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "  }, []);",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (!prompt) return null;",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "  const displayText = &#96;[E] ${prompt.label ?? prompt.type}&#96;;",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "  return (",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "    &lt;div",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "      className=\"interaction-prompt\"",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "      role=\"status\"",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "      aria-live=\"polite\"",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "      aria-label={displayText}",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "    &gt;",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "      {displayText}",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "    &lt;/div&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "  );",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3332858979701996
    },

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default function DialogueBox() {",
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "isSignature": true

            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "  useEffect(() =&gt; {",

          },

          },

          },

          },

            "text": "  }, [isOpen]);",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "  // TTS: speak current line when it changes (include choices)",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "  useEffect(() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!isOpen || !currentLine) return;",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "    let text = currentLine.speaker",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "      ? &#96;${currentLine.speaker}: ${currentLine.text}&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "      : currentLine.text;",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (currentLine.choices &amp;&amp; currentLine.choices.length &gt; 0) {",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "      const choiceText = currentLine.choices",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "        .map((c) =&gt; &#96;Press ${c.key.toUpperCase()} for ${c.label}&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "        .join('. ');",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "      text += &#96;. ${choiceText}&#96;;",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "    speak(text);",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "    return () =&gt; cancelSpeech();",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "  }, [isOpen, lineIndex, currentLine]);",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "  useEffect(() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!isOpen) cancelSpeech();",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "  }, [isOpen]);",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "  useEffect(() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!isOpen) return;",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "    const handleKey = (e: KeyboardEvent) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (e.repeat) return;",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "      ",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Handle choice selection",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (hasChoices &amp;&amp; currentLine?.choices) {",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "        const choice = currentLine.choices.find(",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "          (c) =&gt; c.key.toLowerCase() === e.key.toLowerCase()",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "        );",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "        if (choice) {",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "          e.preventDefault();",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "          handleChoice(choice.action);",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "          return;",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "      ",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (e.code === 'Space' || e.code === 'Enter') {",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "        e.preventDefault();",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "        advance();",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",

          },
          {

          },
          {

          },

          },

          },

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./EDITING.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 79
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# Starship Alexandria — Content Editing Guide",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "Quick reference for editing game content. All narrative content lives in the &#96;public/content/&#96; folder as YAML and text files. No TypeScript knowledge required.",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "## Content Files Overview",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "| Content | File |",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "|---------|------|",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "| NPCs &amp; dialogue | &#96;public/content/npcs.yaml&#96; |",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "| Journal entries | &#96;public/content/journals.yaml&#96; |",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "| Books &amp; fragments | &#96;public/content/books.yaml&#96; |",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "| Book text | &#96;public/content/texts/&lt;book-id&gt;/&lt;fragment&gt;.txt&#96; |",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "| Room names | &#96;public/content/rooms.yaml&#96; |",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "| Transporter dialogue | &#96;public/content/dialogue.yaml&#96; |",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "## 1. NPCs (Dialogue &amp; New Characters)",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "**File:** &#96;public/content/npcs.yaml&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "### Edit Existing Dialogue",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "Find the NPC by id and edit their dialogue lines:",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "npcs:",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "  - id: martha",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "    name: Martha",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "    firstMeet:",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "      - speaker: Martha",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "        text: \"Oh! A visitor. I didn't think anyone would find this place.\"",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "      - speaker: Martha",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "        text: \"Your second line here.\"",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "    return:",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "      - speaker: Martha",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "        text: \"What she says when you talk to her again.\"",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;firstMeet&#96; plays the first time you talk to an NPC",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;return&#96; plays on subsequent conversations",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;speaker&#96; is optional; omit it for narration",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "### Add a New NPC",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "Add a new entry to the &#96;npcs&#96; list:",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "  - id: sarah",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "    name: Sarah",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "    firstMeet:",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "      - speaker: Sarah",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "        text: \"Hello!\"",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "    return:",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "      - speaker: Sarah",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "        text: \"Good to see you again.\"",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "No other changes needed. The game picks 1–2 NPCs per map from the catalog.",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "## 2. Journal Entries",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "**File:** &#96;public/content/journals.yaml&#96;",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "### Edit Existing Journals",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "journals:",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "  - id: journal-diary-1",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "    title: Water-damaged diary page",

          },
          {
            "text": "    lines:",

          },
          {
            "text": "      - text: \"First paragraph when you read it.\"",

          },
          {

          },
          {

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "create() {",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.player.setDirection('down');",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.gridMovement = new GridMovement();",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.gridMovement.attach(this, this.player, {",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "      wallLayer: this.wallLayer,",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "      mapWidth: MAP_WIDTH,",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "      mapHeight: MAP_HEIGHT,",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "      getBlockedTiles: () =&gt; this.npcBlockedTiles,",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "      getFloodedTiles: () =&gt; this.mapData.floodedTiles,",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Interaction system",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.interactionSystem = new InteractionSystem();",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.interactionSystem.attach(this, this.player);",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.placeInteractives(rooms, spawnX, spawnY);",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Interaction prompt rendered via React (InteractionPrompt.tsx) to avoid Phaser Text/WebGL bugs",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Mark expedition start (tracks library size for \"new fragments this trip\" calculation)",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "    useGameStore.getState().actions.startExpedition();",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Reset battery at start of expedition",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "    useGameStore.getState().actions.setFlashlight(100);",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.moveCount = 0;",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Sync store on movement",
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "    const onPlayerMoved = ({ x, y }: { x: number; y: number }) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "text": "      useGameStore.getState().actions.movePlayer({ x, y });",
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.moveCount++;",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (this.moveCount % 5 === 0) {",
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "        useGameStore.getState().actions.decrementFlashlight();",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.checkRoomEntry(x, y);",
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.updateFOV(x, y);",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "    EventBridge.on('player-moved', onPlayerMoved);",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 220
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 763,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.323835551738739
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./PLAN.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 242
          },
          "endPosition": {

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "  discovered: boolean;",
            "lineNumber": 243
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 245
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create an initial book catalog with 3-5 books, each with a few fragments loaded:",
            "lineNumber": 246
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Dante's Inferno (select 3-4 cantos)",
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Shakespeare's The Tempest (5 acts)",
            "lineNumber": 248
          },
          {
            "text": "  - One of Chaucer's Canterbury Tales (e.g., The Knight's Tale)",
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Edmund Spenser's Faerie Queene (2-3 cantos from Book I)",
            "lineNumber": 250
          },
          {
            "text": "  - A shorter work: perhaps some of Emily Dickinson's poems as individual fragments",
            "lineNumber": 251
          },
          {
            "text": "  - King James Bible (5-8 iconic chapters, e.g. Genesis 1, Psalm 23, Matthew 5-7, 1 Corinthians 13, Revelation 21 — KJV for thematic \"preserving old texts\" flavor; Gutenberg has it). (Strategies for adding the full Bible deferred to a later phase.)",
            "lineNumber": 252
          },
          {
            "text": "  (Pull actual text from Project Gutenberg — these are all public domain)",
            "lineNumber": 253
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create BookPickup.ts entity:",
            "lineNumber": 254
          },
          {
            "text": "  - A glowing sprite placed on the map in rot.js-generated rooms",
            "lineNumber": 255
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Registers with the Interaction system as type 'book'",
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "text": "  - When interacted with: emit 'book-found' event, show book detail, add to store",
            "lineNumber": 257
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Visual feedback: particle effect or glow animation on pickup (deferred; book-pickup sprite used)",
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Place 2-4 book fragments per generated map, always inside rooms",
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Placement algorithm:",
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Pick random rooms from the rot.js room list",
            "lineNumber": 261
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Place fragment at a random open tile within the room",
            "lineNumber": 262
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Ensure no two fragments in the same room",
            "lineNumber": 263
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Ensure at least one fragment is in a room far from spawn",
            "lineNumber": 264
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2.4 — NPCs &amp; Journal Entries",
            "lineNumber": 266
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create 2-3 NPC definitions in &#96;src/data/npcs.ts&#96;:",
            "lineNumber": 267
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Each NPC has a name, appearance (sprite index), and dialogue tree",
            "lineNumber": 268
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Example NPCs:",
            "lineNumber": 269
          },
          {
            "text": "    - **Martha** — A former librarian, sheltering in the ruins. Gives lore about what happened.",
            "lineNumber": 270
          },
          {
            "text": "    - **Eli** — A scavenger who hints at where rare books might be found.",
            "lineNumber": 271
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Dialogue is an array of lines, shown one at a time in DialogueBox",
            "lineNumber": 272
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create NPC entity (placed in ExploreScene, no separate file):",
            "lineNumber": 273
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Static sprite placed in a room",
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Registers with Interaction system as type 'npc'",
            "lineNumber": 275
          }
        ]
      },

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "private placeInteractives(",
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "text": "    rooms: GeneratedRoom[],",
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnX: number,",
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnY: number",
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": "  ): void {",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "text": "for (let i = 0; i &lt; count &amp;&amp; i &lt; roomsToUse.length &amp;&amp; i &lt; fragments.length; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 327
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 344
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 345
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Shadow: dark circle under book — improves visibility on light floors",
            "lineNumber": 346
          },
          {
            "text": "      const shadow = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 347
          },
          {
            "text": "      shadow.fillStyle(0x1a1a2e, 0.6);",
            "lineNumber": 348
          },
          {
            "text": "      shadow.fillCircle(0, 2, 14);",
            "lineNumber": 349
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(shadow);",
            "lineNumber": 350
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 351
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Dark outline ring — strong silhouette on any floor color",
            "lineNumber": 352
          },
          {
            "text": "      const outlineRing = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 353
          },
          {
            "text": "      outlineRing.lineStyle(5, 0x1a1a2e, 1);",
            "lineNumber": 354
          },
          {
            "text": "      outlineRing.strokeCircle(0, 0, 18);",
            "lineNumber": 355
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(outlineRing);",
            "lineNumber": 356
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 357
          },
          {
            "text": "      const ring = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 358
          },
          {
            "text": "      ring.lineStyle(3, 0xd4af37, 1); // Gold highlight — always bright",
            "lineNumber": 359
          },
          {
            "text": "      ring.strokeCircle(0, 0, 18);",
            "lineNumber": 360
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(ring);",
            "lineNumber": 361
          },
          {
            "text": "      const sprite = this.add.sprite(0, 0, 'book-pickup');",
            "lineNumber": 362
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(sprite);",
            "lineNumber": 363
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.bookContainers.set(frag.id, container);",
            "lineNumber": 364
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 365
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Subtle pulse so books are easy to spot",
            "lineNumber": 366
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.tweens.add({",
            "lineNumber": 367
          },
          {
            "text": "        targets: container,",
            "lineNumber": 368
          },
          {
            "text": "        scale: 1.08,",
            "lineNumber": 369
          },
          {
            "text": "        duration: 900,",
            "lineNumber": 370
          },
          {
            "text": "        yoyo: true,",
            "lineNumber": 371
          },
          {
            "text": "        repeat: -1,",
            "lineNumber": 372
          },
          {
            "text": "        ease: 'Sine.easeInOut',",
            "lineNumber": 373
          },
          {
            "text": "      });",
            "lineNumber": 374
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.interactionSystem.register({",
            "lineNumber": 375
          },
          {
            "text": "        id: frag.id,",
            "lineNumber": 376
          },
          {
            "text": "        type: 'book',",
            "lineNumber": 377
          },
          {
            "text": "        gridX: tile.x,",
            "lineNumber": 378
          },
          {
            "text": "        gridY: tile.y,",
            "lineNumber": 379
          },
          {
            "text": "        label,",
            "lineNumber": 380
          },
          {
            "text": "      });",
            "lineNumber": 381
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Track which room this book is in (for updating Martha's hints)",
            "lineNumber": 382
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.bookToRoomMap.set(frag.id, room.name);",
            "lineNumber": 383
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 384
          },
          {
            "text": "    useGameStore.getState().actions.setBooksOnThisMap(count);",
            "lineNumber": 385
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 386
          },
          {
            "text": "    // NPCs: 1–2 per map, in rooms other than spawn, never in same room as a book",
            "lineNumber": 387
          },
          {
            "text": "    const roomsWithBooks = new Set(roomsToUse.map((r) =&gt; r.room));",
            "lineNumber": 388
          },
          {
            "text": "    const npcRoomData = roomData.filter(({ room }) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 389
          },
          {
            "text": "      const dx = Math.abs(room.centerX - spawnX);",
            "lineNumber": 390
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 395
          },

            "text": "  }",

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/game/systems/Interaction.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},

          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "import { Scene } from 'phaser';",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "import { EventBridge } from '../EventBridge';",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "import { useGameStore } from '@/store/gameStore';",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "import type { IControllablePlayer, Interactive } from '@/types/game';",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "const INTERACTION_BLOCKED_PHASES = ['dialogue', 'reading'] as const;",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "// Global lock to prevent interaction processing during state transitions",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "let interactionLocked = false;",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "export function lockInteractions() { interactionLocked = true; }",
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "export function unlockInteractions() { interactionLocked = false; }",
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": " * Proximity-based interaction detection.",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": " * 'on' interactives (books, journals, transporter): prompt when standing ON the tile.",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": " * 'adjacent' interactives (NPCs): prompt when standing next to the tile (solid, block movement).",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": " * Emits interaction-available and interaction-triggered via EventBridge.",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 18
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2932734489440918

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "private placeInteractives(",
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "text": "    rooms: GeneratedRoom[],",
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnX: number,",
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnY: number",
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": "  ): void {",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 388
          },
          {
            "text": "    const npcRoomData = roomData.filter(({ room }) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 389
          },
          {
            "text": "      const dx = Math.abs(room.centerX - spawnX);",
            "lineNumber": 390
          },
          {
            "text": "      const dy = Math.abs(room.centerY - spawnY);",
            "lineNumber": 391
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (dx &lt;= 1 &amp;&amp; dy &lt;= 1) return false; // exclude spawn room",
            "lineNumber": 392
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (roomsWithBooks.has(room)) return false; // exclude rooms with books",
            "lineNumber": 393
          },
          {
            "text": "      return true;",
            "lineNumber": 394
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 395
          },
          {
            "text": "    const npcCount = Math.min(1 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 2), npcRoomData.length);",
            "lineNumber": 396
          },
          {
            "text": "    const npcCatalog = getNPCCatalogSync();",
            "lineNumber": 397
          },
          {
            "text": "    const npcsToPlace = [...npcCatalog].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5).slice(0, npcCount);",
            "lineNumber": 398
          },
          {
            "text": "    const npcRooms: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {};",
            "lineNumber": 399
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 400
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let i = 0; i &lt; npcCount &amp;&amp; i &lt; npcRoomData.length; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 401
          },
          {
            "text": "      const { room, tiles } = npcRoomData[i];",
            "lineNumber": 402
          },
          {
            "text": "      const npc = npcsToPlace[i];",
            "lineNumber": 403
          },
          {
            "text": "      const available = tiles.filter(",
            "lineNumber": 404
          },
          {
            "text": "        (t) =&gt; !usedTiles.has(&#96;${t.x},${t.y}&#96;) &amp;&amp; ",
            "lineNumber": 405
          },
          {
            "text": "               !isAdjacentToUsed(t.x, t.y) &amp;&amp;",
            "lineNumber": 406
          },
          {
            "text": "               !isCorridorTile(t.x, t.y) // Don't block corridors/doorways",
            "lineNumber": 407
          },
          {
            "text": "      );",
            "lineNumber": 408
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (available.length === 0 || !npc) continue;",
            "lineNumber": 409
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 410
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Sort by distance to room center (prefer interior tiles, avoid doorways)",
            "lineNumber": 411
          },
          {
            "text": "      const sortedByCenter = [...available].sort((a, b) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 412
          },
          {
            "text": "        const distA = Math.abs(a.x - room.centerX) + Math.abs(a.y - room.centerY);",
            "lineNumber": 413
          },
          {
            "text": "        const distB = Math.abs(b.x - room.centerX) + Math.abs(b.y - room.centerY);",
            "lineNumber": 414
          },
          {
            "text": "        return distA - distB;",
            "lineNumber": 415
          },
          {
            "text": "      });",
            "lineNumber": 416
          },
          {
            "text": "      ",
            "lineNumber": 417
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Pick from the closest 30% to center (or at least top 2)",
            "lineNumber": 418
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 465
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 571
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 763,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.29077064990997314
    },

          },

            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },

          },

            "text": "  ): this {",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./PLAN.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 133
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 173
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create a static test tilemap (hardcoded 2D array) in ExploreScene.ts",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Ground layer (floor, grass, dirt)",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Wall/collision layer (rubble, walls, impassable terrain)",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Decoration layer (non-blocking visual detail)",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Render the tilemap in Phaser with proper layer ordering",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Set up camera to follow player with smooth lerp",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Configure world bounds to match map dimensions",
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "### 1.4 — Player Entity &amp; Grid Movement",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create Player.ts entity:",
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Sprite with 4-directional idle frames (or single frame to start)",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Grid position (tile coordinates) separate from pixel position",
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Facing direction",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create GridMovement.ts system:",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Listen for arrow keys and WASD",
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "  - On input: calculate target tile → check collision → tween sprite to new position",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Movement is discrete: one tile per input, with a short tween animation (150ms)",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Block input during tween (prevent diagonal cheating)",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Emit 'player-moved' event with new position",
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "text": "  - **Interface-based**: implement a &#96;MovementController&#96; interface so this can be",
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "    swapped for &#96;FreeMovementController&#96; later without changing Player.ts",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Add collision detection against wall layer tiles",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Walking animation if spritesheet supports it (otherwise just face direction)",
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "### 1.5 — Interaction System",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create Interaction.ts system:",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Track interactive objects near the player (within 1 tile, in facing direction)",
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "text": "  - When player faces an interactive object, show a subtle prompt",
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "text": "  - On pressing E or Space, trigger the interaction",
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Interactive objects register themselves with the system",
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Each interactive has a type: 'book', 'npc', 'journal', 'transporter'",
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Emit 'interaction-available' and 'interaction-triggered' events via EventBridge",
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "text": "### 1.6 — React UI Shell",
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create GameContainer.tsx:",
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Mounts the Phaser game canvas",
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Renders UI overlays on top of / beside the canvas",
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Subscribes to EventBridge for showing/hiding overlays",
            "lineNumber": 171
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create HUD.tsx:",
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Shows current area name",
            "lineNumber": 173
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.25220733880996704
    },

          {
            "text": "export interface SessionState {",
